title: ACE, Other Associations Urge GSA to Rescind Proposed Certification Requirements on “Unlawful DEI” and Other Issues
summary_en: ACE, other associations say a Trump administration proposal to require all federal funding recipients to certify they do not have unlawful DEI programs and practices would create significant uncertainty for institutions.
title_cn: 美国教育理事会及其他协会敦促美国总务管理局撤销关于“非法多元化、公平与包容”及其他问题的拟议认证要求

title: ACTS Deadline Shifts as ACE, Other Associations Support Legal Challenge
summary_en: ACE and 10 other higher education associations submitted an amicus brief yesterday supporting a motion brought by the plaintiffs for a stay of the IPEDS Admissions and Consumer Transparency Supplement while the court considers and decides the case.
title_cn: [待翻译] ACTS Deadline Shifts as ACE, Other Associations Support Legal Challenge
